name: Brown Sugar Pound Cake
recipeIngredient: 1 cup packed brown sugar (C and H Golden)
recipeInstructions:
1. Beat together the sugar and butter until light and fluffy.
2. Add the eggs one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Stir in the vanilla extract.
4. Combine the flour, baking powder, and salt.
5. Mix these dry ingredients into the creamed mixture.
6. Pour the batter into a greased and floured 9x5x3-inch loaf pan.
7. Bake in an oven set to 350 degrees for one hour or until a toothpick inserted into the center of the cake comes out clean.
8. Remove from the pan and cool on a rack.
